action: Train a Machine Learning Model using Scikit-learn for the Real-Time Distributed Monitoring Tool
details:
Run the following command in the terminal to train a machine learning model using Scikit-learn: 

```bash
python -m src/rt_dm/train_model.py --dataset-path /path/to/dataset --model-path /path/to/model --output-path /path/to/output
```
